response.justification: Bogdan has deep technical expertise, open-source leadership, and broad system design experience, but lacks demonstrated leadership in IT consulting, UML modeling, and German language proficiency (only basic), which are critical for this executive-level role requiring client advisory and team leadership in a German-speaking context.
strengths: Extensive open-source contributions and platform leadership (GISCollective)
Proven full-stack development across languages and domains (DLang, Node, TypeScript, embedded)
Strong track record in mentoring, workshops, and dev-ops infrastructure setup
concerns: German language proficiency is only basic, not meeting C1 requirement
No explicit evidence of UML modeling, architecture design for enterprise clients, or IT compliance
Current career gap and recent short-term roles raise questions about sustained leadership continuity
